Donada MacKenneth
memoryArtifacts.description:
Married Finlaech, Mormaer of Moray ( Mormaer was a Celtic title which appears
to have been the equivalent of Thane or Earl,) and they were the parents of
Macbeth, who was therefore Duncan's first cous …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Donada Canmore of Dunkeld於大約0990年出生在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾時，她的父親King Malcolm II of Scotland33歲，母親Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY29歲。她於0960年與Archibald Cameron I在英國蘇格蘭結婚。她去世於1034年11月25日在蘇格蘭奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Donada Canmore of Dunkeld于大约0990年出生在苏格兰艾爾金爾时，她的父亲King Malcolm II of Scotland33岁，母亲Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY29岁。她于0960年与Archibald Cameron I在英国苏格兰结婚。她去世于1034年11月25日在苏格兰奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Canmore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Pasquale, Amedeo, Claudio, Emilio, Enrico, Filippo, Rocco, Salvatore.
Italian: from cantore ‘singer’ (from Latin cantor ‘singer, poet’), hence an occupational name for a singer or cantor, or a nickname for someone who sang well.

variants.name: Cantarella
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Canio, Carlo, Domenic, Carmine, Dante, Francesco, Palma, Paolo, Salvatore.
from a diminutive of cantaro ‘night pot’, presumably applied as a derogatory nickname.

nameMeanings.name: Donada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German von Nida (see Nida ). It is common in PA.

en.lifeSummary: When Donada Canmore of Dunkeld was born about 0990, in Elginshire, Scotland, her father, King Malcolm II of Scotland, was 33 and her mother, Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY, was 29. She married Archibald Cameron I in 0960, in Scotland, United Kingdom. She died on 25 November 1034, in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Donada Canmore of Dunkeld est née environ 0990, à Elginshire, Écosse, son père, King Malcolm II of Scotland, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Archibald Cameron I en 0960, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 25 novembre 1034, à Orkney Islands, Orkney, Écosse, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Donada Canmore of Dunkeld um 0990 in Elginshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Malcolm II of Scotland 33 und ihre Mutter Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY 29. Sie hat 0960 in Schottland, United Kingdom Archibald Cameron I geheiratet. Sie starb am 25. November 1034 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Donada Canmore of Dunkeld è nata il circa 0990 nel Elginshire, Scotland, sua padre, King Malcolm II of Scotland, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Archibald Cameron I nel 0960, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 25 novembre 1034, nel Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Donada Canmore of Dunkeldが約0990年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアで生まれた時，父King Malcolm II of Scotlandは33歳，母Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORYは29歳であった。0960年にイギリススコットランドでArchibald Cameron Iと結婚した。彼女は1034年11月25日にスコットランドオルクニーオルクニー イスランズで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Donada Canmore of Dunkeld(이)가 대략 0990년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Malcolm II of Scotland(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 0960년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Archibald Cameron I(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1034년 11월 25일 스컷랜드 르니 르니 이슬랜드즈에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Donada Canmore of Dunkeld nasceu aproximadamente 0990, em Elginshire, Scotland, seu pai, King Malcolm II of Scotland, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Archibald Cameron I em 0960, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 25 de novembro de 1034, em Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Donada Canmore of Dunkeld родилась около 0990 г. в местности элгиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени King Malcolm II of Scotland было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Archibald Cameron I в 0960 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. Она умерла 25 ноября 1034 г. в местности орни исландс, орни, Шотландия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Donada Canmore of Dunkeld nació aproximadamente 0990, en Elginshire, Scotland, su papá, King Malcolm II of Scotland, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Archibald Cameron I en 0960, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió el 25 de noviembre de 1034, en Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, a la edad de 45 años.
